Class ExplosiveBarrel

java.lang.Object
game.entities.GameEntity
game.entities.traps.Trap
game.entities.traps.ExplosiveBarrel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Collidable, Renderable, Updatable
public class ExplosiveBarrel extends Trap
Represents the explosive barrel.
